Title: Bodyguards and Assassins
Writer: Junli Guo, Tin-Nam Chun, Joyce Chan
Actors: Xueqi Wang, Tony Ka Fai Leung, Jun Hu
Plot: In 1905, revolutionist Sun Yat-Sen visits Hong Kong to discuss plans with Tongmenghui members to overthrow the Qing dynasty. But when they find out that assassins have been sent to kill him, they assemble a group of protectors to prevent any attacks.
